name: CODE2040
short_description: CODE2040 is a teamwork-focused multiplayer online shooting/battle royale game with three people as a team. In the year of 2040, when energy is extremely scarce, you must adventure into the Outside to explore new energy sources. Accomplish the mission and return safely.
detailed_description:
A natural disaster took place at the 13-Layer Remains had unveiled the realm, namely The Outside, where abundant resources were at but brimmed with uncertainties. You will act as a hired convict by R.D. company to eliminate all threats during the realm exploring operation. Reach the Inspection Tower in time, activate the Teleportation Unit and fulfill your mission objectives.

SOMA Ball, your best exploration partner

The new mineral SOMA offers many battle aiding functions such as Shield for tanks, Scan for assassins and Medic for healers. Bringing you desired type of SOMA Ball decides your role in the team, allowing diversified combinations of strategies.


Monsters in rampage, it is time to challenge your limit and show your guts

It is not a rumor that people who had gone missing were taken away by monsters.
You will encounter them while exploring The Outside. Do not hesitate, just load your weapons and fire at will! After killing them, you might also acquire...


NRSS neckband, every second counts for your survival

There will be no escape, NRSS is attached on the neck of all participants in order to constrain them. Only death awaits if you do not reach Safe Zone in time! Try your best to accomplish your mission before the time ends!

Teleportation Unit, the only tool of escaping

The final objective is to successfully escape The Outside realm, the monstrous killing is merely a measure to meet your goal. You can eliminate all others and leave with the Teleportation Unit at ease, or take the chance to launch the Teleportation Unit while everyone else is busy slaying each other, leaving them to die with full faces of tragic.
